title: Lazy mulch loading replaces eager prime
rationale: Instead of dumping all mulch prime output into system prompt, inject compact domain index summaries at startup. Agent calls mulch_query tool on demand when topic is relevant.

title: Session-end reflection before /clear
rationale: Before clearing session context, agent runs reflection loop (max 10 iterations) to record any learnings worth keeping to mulch. Config: reflect_on_clear (default true).

content: autoRecordLearnings goroutine is being removed. Replaced by explicit mulch_record tool calls by the agent during conversation, plus session-end reflection on /clear.

description: Manually editing Mulch JSONL files instead of using proper mulch record commands leads to schema validation errors and broken IDs
resolution: Always use mulch record command to create new expertise entries and mulch edit to modify existing ones

content: Always run mulch validate before mulch prime to ensure records are properly formatted

description: Agent failed to read AGENTS.md documentation and proceeded to edit files without understanding proper Mulch workflow
resolution: Updated AGENTS.md with explicit warnings and mandatory workflow steps to prevent future violations
